title: ononis alba subsp. monophylla
intro: Ononis alba subsp. monophylla, also known as the one-leafed restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which has been attributed to its high concentration of isoflavones and saponins. The health benefits of Ononis alba subsp. monophylla include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Ononis alba subsp. monophylla include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water.
